name: awac-claude-code-plugins
description: Custom plugins for Claude Code by Ivan Lutsenko

plugins.name: bereke-business-test-gen
plugins.description: Automated unit test generation for Kotlin/Android business logic with corporate standards

plugins.name: crashlytics
plugins.description: Multi-platform crash analysis for Android & iOS with git blame forensics and code-level fixes. Language-aware validator (en/ru/es/de/fr/pt/it), origin/<branch> forensics. MCP-primary fetch with REST API fallback.

plugins.name: obsidian-tracker
plugins.description: Project tracking, task management with kanban boards, bug logging, decision records (ADR), session management, and engineering traceability via Obsidian

plugins.name: locale-notifications
plugins.description: Локалізовані macOS сповіщення для Claude Code (uk/ru/kk/en)

plugins.name: auto-theme
plugins.description: Auto-sync Claude Code theme with macOS system appearance (dark/light mode)

plugins.name: combined-review
plugins.description: Combined code review: multi-agent analysis (code-reviewer, git-historian, silent-failure-hunter, test-analyzer) + CodeRabbit CLI

plugins.name: clip-maker
plugins.description: Automated vertical clip creator for talks: whisper + Claude (moments + smart crop) + ffmpeg

plugins.name: drawbridge
plugins.description: Bridge between a short brief and image-gen web UIs (Gemini/ChatGPT/Grok/Midjourney). Crafts target-tuned prompt, copies to clipboard, opens the UI — no API keys.

plugins.name: plugin-cross-port
plugins.description: Bidirectional conversion between Claude Code and Codex plugin formats. CC → Codex and Codex → CC, one-shot or continuous.
